cell_prompts: live action, clinical midnight thriller photography with hard edge practicals and cool city spill carving subjects out of shadow. . Nova, at frame_left, standing, eyes scanning, expression carefully neutral, jaw slightly set, looking at distance. camera facing east. the surveillance district skyline blinking beyond the ledge. wide establishing shot

live action, clinical midnight thriller photography with hard edge practicals and cool city spill carving subjects out of shadow. . Nova, at frame_center, reading the vibrating pager, holding signal pager, eyes steady and focused, jaw set, chin level. camera facing east. the surveillance district skyline blinking beyond the ledge. medium close-up

live action, clinical midnight thriller photography with hard edge practicals and cool city spill carving subjects out of shadow. . Nova, at frame_left, closing the distance to Rafe on the landing, holding signal pager, tense. Rafe, at frame_right, leaning, eyes scanning, expression carefully neutral, jaw slightly set, looking at cast_nova. camera facing north. the open exit door bleeding streetlight down the stairwell core. two-shot

live action, clinical midnight thriller photography with hard edge practicals and cool city spill carving subjects out of shadow. . Nova, at frame_left, standing, holding signal pager, eyes snapping wide, eyebrows shooting up, breath caught, looking at cast_rafe. Rafe, at frame_right, pressing the order into Nova's space, urgent, looking at cast_nova. camera facing north. the open exit door bleeding streetlight down the stairwell core. over-shoulder dialogue
